About Us
Post navigation
Bond Advocates LLP is a top law firm located at Top Plaza, Kilimani, Nairobi, Kenya. Our founding partners boast a combined 50+ years of experience as some of the best lawyers in Kenya. We are a top-notch litigation and commercial law firm serving local and international clients.
The mission of Bond Advocates LLP is to be the best law firm in Kenya by creating meaningful experiences for each client. One client at a time. We uphold excellence, professionalism, integrity, environmental sustainability, and social responsibility in our work.
Bond Advocates LLP has a trustworthy reputation for giving trusted solutions. Our word is our bond.
Bond Advocates LLP has signed up to the United Nations Global Compact. Hence, Bond Advocates LLP commits to align its strategies and operations with universal principles on human rights, labour, environment and anti-corruption. We also commit to take actions that advance societal goals.
Bond follows the Environment, Social, and Governance (ESG) framework and is a woman-owned business.
We pursue environmental sustainability and social responsibility Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) measures at Bond Advocates LLP. We are mindful of our carbon footprint and the reality of climate change so we encourage full use of e-justice and e-practice to limit our contribution to deforestation. The Supreme Court of Kenya grounds has a tree planted by our partners. We recycle paper by using them for rough drafts where necessary. Our policies require minimal energy use and we enforce a lights-off policy in unoccupied rooms. Machines that are not in use must be switched off at Bond Advocates LLP.
On the social angle, our partners have to take at least one probono case per year or perform other acts for the poor and underserved in the society. Our firm offers pro bono service through the Law Society of Kenya. We also offer pro bono service through the TrustLaw (Thompson Reuters Foundation) network facilitating legal assistance and research for frontline human rights organisations around the world and in Kenya. Our partners contribute to fundraising for underprivileged students at the Kenya School of Law while mentoring younger lawyers at various stages of their career. Besides the firm initiatives, we encourage our partners to contribute to charitable causes within their communities. Bond Advocates LLP willingly leads and helps other lawfirms to troubleshoot legal issues on request.
As the Bond Advocates LLP family, we treat each other, colleagues, suppliers, and clients fairly and with dignity.
We enforce anti-harrassment and anti-discrimination policies. Bond Advocates LLP supports human rights and labour standards. We also enforce workplace health and safety policies besides policies on data protection and privacy. We value diversity and community. We are close partners of Katiba Institute, a constitutional research and litigation institute engaged in public interest litigation.
On governance, our goal is gold-standard customer satisfaction consistent with our vision to be Kenya’s top ranked law firm for client care within the first two years of osperation. Our mission is to create meaningful experiences for each client.
We conduct our business ethically and do not engage in corruption, bribery, or conflict of interest. The firm is properly structured and managed and our leadership board is diversified. We conduct periodic regulatory and compliance risk assessment to guarantee the continuity and sustainability of Bond Advocates LLP business in the long term.
Bond Advocates LLP’s vision is to be Kenya’s best-ranked law firm for excellent client care. Our mission is to create meaningful experiences for each client.

Our People
Associates & Consultants
Post navigation
CredentialsKitinya is an incisive, forward thinking heart-based leader with a wealth of experience in Strategy formulation and execution that cements his legal and business acumen. He is a top notch global contracts & procurement expert with unrivaled expertise in transacting and negotiating multi-billion shillings complex commercial contracts across the globe.
Besides his legal qualifications, Kitinya holds a Bachelor’s degree in Commerce from the University of Nairobi, a Professional Mediation Training from Mediation Training Institute E.A, a Professional Diploma in Procurement & Supply from the Chartered Institute of Procurement and Supply (MCIPS), and Certified Public Accountancy certificate from KASNEB.
At Bond Advocates LLP, in addition to being the Managing Partner, Kitinya heads and focuses on Procurement Law & Practice; Contracts & Commercial Transactions; Employment & Labour Relations as well as Tax Law. His other practice areas include Litigation & Alternative Dispute Resolution; Building Construction; Public Private Partnerships; Project Finance; Medico-Legal; Aviation Law; Constitutional Law and Governance.
Kitinya’s legal and commercial acumen emanates from his previous assignments in various organizations, including Kitinya & Company Advocates (Managing Partner), Lumumba & Ayieko Advocates (Partner), Kenya Airways PLC (Senior Manager- Contracts & Procurement), The Karen Hospital (Head of Contracts/SCM, as well as Barclays Bank of Kenya (currently Absa Kenya).

Credentials
Barbara has extensive knowledge in commercial litigation and arbitration. She is a Certified Professional Mediator and an alumnus of the Trial Advocacy Training Institute, Nairobi. Barbara is finalizing her Master of Law (Law in Governance and Democracy) studies at the University of Nairobi. Barbara has a wealth of experience obtained from Senior Counsel Okongo Omogeni Advocates, Senior Counsel Fred Ngatia & Associates, and McKay Advocates.
Membership in professional societies
Mr Situma is an accomplished commercial lawyer litigator with 11+ years of post-qualification experience. He has appeared and litigated cases on behalf of clients with great success at various tribunals, subordinate courts, specialized courts, and superior courts. At Bond Advocates, Mr. Situma’s areas of practice are in companies law, labour and employment law, criminal law, electoral law and processes, public procurement law, constitutional and administrative law, compensation claims for personal injury or material damages, family law and succession, debt recoveries, and land disputes.
He has acted for private individuals, politicians, companies in the financial sector, agricultural sector, Trusts, SACCOS, insurance companies, banks, and developers in high-value conveyancing briefs. At Bond Advocates LLP Situma heads the real estate and conveyancing practice.
Situma holds a Bachelor of Laws Degree and a Post Graduate Diploma in Law.
Membership In Professional Societies
Ochiel Dudley, FCIArb, is an award-winning Kenyan trial and appellate lawyer, named ICJ-Kenya Jurist of the Year (2023) and inducted into the Litigation Hall of Fame (2024) by The Lawyer Africa. A regular before the Supreme Court of Kenya, he has argued over 50 landmark Supreme Court cases—shaping Kenyan jurisprudence.
His expertise runs deep in international family law, complex litigation, alternative dispute resolution and arbitration. He acts for local and international clients facing employment, commercial, and environmental disputes. He is a formidable litigator for clients in high-value claims concerning public-private partnerships and public procurement. He is an unmatched authority in judicial review and constitutional law, where he has won many landmark victories.
Ochiel, a leading family lawyer in Kenya, is a Fellow of the International Academy of Family Lawyers and often leads Law Society of Kenya seminars on complex family law matters. He is a Fellow of the Chartered Institute of Arbitrators and a Certified Professional Mediator.
Ochiel lectures at the Kenya School of Law’s Advocates Training Programme, where he helps to shape future legal luminaries.
Expertise:
Academic and Professional Qualifications
Contacts
Jaqueline Wamai is an Advocate and employment law specialist. She holds a Masters Degree in Labour Policies and Globalisation from the Berlin School of Economics and Law. She has extensive obtained from working within the labour movement in Kenya and as Regional Coordinator for the International Lawyers Assisting Workers (ILAW). Wamae has advised clients globally on different aspects of international labour law.
Faith Chepkorir Sambu holds a Master of Arts in Law and Diplomacy (MALD) degree from The Fletcher School of Law and Diplomacy, Tufts University. She specialises in international negotiation & conflict resolution besides international legal studies. Chepkorir holds a Bachelors degree from the University of Nairobi and a post-graduate diploma at the Kenya School of Law, and is a member of the Law Society of Kenya.
At Bond Advocates LLP, Chepkorir is senior associate within the advisory and consultancy department specializing in public sector consultancies and research. She also practices human rights law, international negotiations, and mediation.
Her active memberships include the American Society of International Law.
Morgan is an associate within the litigation and dispute resolution department. His areas of specialty are commercial litigation, criminal defense, and employment disputes.
Arnold Austine is an associate within the litigation and dispute resolution department at Bond Advocates. His areas of specialty are commercial and civil litigation, family law, judicial review, and employment law.
Emelda is an associate within the Conveyancing and Real Estate Law department at Bond Advocates. Emelda specializes in banking and recoveries, real estate and conveyancing, and securities.
Carolyne Nekesa is an associate within the litigation and dispute resolution department at Bond Advocates. She has a Bachelor of Laws Degree from JKUAT and a Post-graduate Diploma in Law from the Kenya School of Law. She is a Master of Laws student at the University of Nairobi. She is a member of the Law Society of Kenya in good standing. Her areas of priority are employment disputes, commercial litigation, and arbitration.
Bond Advocates LLP’s vision is to be Kenya’s best-ranked law firm for excellent client care. Our mission is to create meaningful experiences for each client.

Our Expertise
Family Law
Expertise
Bond Advocates LLP understand that family life changes can be distressing. You can rely on the top family law experts at Bond Advocates LLP to guide you through the seasons of life. We are experts in international marriage procedures and pre-nuptials. When marriage ends, we take our clients through divorces, disputes on maintenance. and custody of children. We also act on matrimonial property and post-nuptial agreements. Our first approach is to always seek out amicable settlements and so we value family mediation.
Bond Advocates LLP is also a top law firm for wills, probate, succession, and estate planning in Nairobi, Kenya. We understand the Children Act, 2022 international adoptions, child maintenance, and custody in Kenya.
The Bond Advocates LLP practice extends to paternity, surrogacy, fertility, & assisted reproduction, spousal maintenance, and alimony. We also assist victims of domestic violence in getting protection orders under the Protection Against Domestic Violence Act, 2015. Our partner argued Kenya’s leading precedent on the best interest of the child before the Supreme Court.This is why clients review Bond Advocates LLP as among the best law firms for family law, matrimonial property, and succession law, in Nairobi Kenya.
Bond Advocates LLP’s vision is to be Kenya’s best-ranked law firm for excellent client care. Our mission is to create meaningful experiences for each client.
